title: ARCHIVED - T4127-JAN Payroll Deductions Formulas - 119th Edition - Effective January 1, 2024 - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - T4127-JAN Payroll Deductions Formulas - 119th Edition - Effective January 1, 2024
You can view this publication in:
- HTML t4127-jan-24e.html
- PDF t4127-01-24e.pdf
The following information from this publication guide is also available in comma-separated value (CSV) format:
- CSV Claim codes – Federal
- CSV Claim codes – Alberta
- CSV Claim codes – British Columbia
- CSV Claim codes – Manitoba
- CSV Claim codes – New Brunswick
- CSV Claim codes – Newfoundland and Labrador
- CSV Claim codes – Northwest Territories
- CSV Claim codes – Nova Scotia
- CSV Claim codes – Nunavut
- CSV Claim codes – Ontario
- CSV Claim codes – Prince Edward Island
- CSV Claim codes – Saskatchewan
- CSV Claim codes – Yukon
- CSV Canada Pension Plan/Quebec Pension Plan Contribution Rates and Amounts
- CSV Canada Pension Plan/Quebec Pension Plan Base Rates and Amounts
- CSV Canada Pension Plan/Quebec Pension Plan First Additional Rates and Amounts
- CSV Canada Pension Plan/Quebec Pension Plan Second Additional Rates and Amounts
- CSV Quebec Parental Insurance Plan Rates and Amounts
- CSV Employment Insurance
- CSV Other rates and amounts
- CSV Rates, Income Thresholds and Constants
Last update: 2023-11-21
